Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Packaging
Ships in product packaging
Ships in product packaging

This item has been tested to certify it can ship safely in its original box or bag to avoid unnecessary packaging. Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.

If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

      Recommended Uses For Product Bathroom, Living Room ,Dining ,Kitchen
      Product Dimensions 11.8"D x 23.6"W x 31.5"H

      About this item

      • Spacious yet Space-Saving: Sized at 11.8"D x 23.6"W x 31.5"H, this storage unit occupies a small footprint while offering lots of storage. With this unit, you can make the most of your space
      • Sturdy, Stable, and Safe: Made of robust MDF, this freestanding storage cabinet is sturdy and stable; the anti-tip kit hidden on the back of this storage cabinet adds to the overall stability and safety
      • Adjustable Shelves: This multipurpose storage unit comes with 2 adjustable shelves (each has 3 heights) behind the doors, allowing you to organize both tall and short items and keep them away from dust
      • Beautiful Addition to Any Room: Elegant green color, combined with unique beadboard-style cabinet, make a stylish storage unit that fits in easily with your home decor, whether it’s your bathroom, living room, or entryway
      • Easy-Peasy Assembly: Never worry about assembly! Labeled parts and easy-to-follow instructions make this freestanding cabinet a breeze to assemble
      › See more product details

      Product description

      Specifications:

      • Color: Forest Green
      • Material: MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard)
      • Product Size: 11.8"D x 23.6"W x 31.5"H (30 x 60 x 80 cm)
      • Product Weight: 28.7 lb (13 kg)
      • Max. Static Load Capacity of the Tabletop: 110 lb (50 kg)
      • Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Adjustable Shelf: 33 lb (15 kg)

      Package Contents:

      • 1 x Floor Cabinet
      • 1 x Accessory Bag
      • 1 x Anti-Tip Kit
      • 1 x Instructions

      VASAGLE Notes:

      • For safety, be sure to secure the storage cabinet to the wall with the included anti-tip kit.
      • Do not expose the cabinet to water for extended periods of time to avoid cracking and deformation.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
      Sponsored

      Customers say

      Customers find the storage cabinet easy to assemble, taking about 2 hours, and appreciate its quality and appearance, noting it looks expensive. The cabinet offers good storage capacity, holding more than expected and being perfect for storing toiletries, while fitting well in various spaces including under windows. Customers consider it good value for money, though opinions about sturdiness are mixed, with some finding it sturdy for the price while others report wobbly doors. Size opinions are also mixed, with some finding it perfect for their space while others say it's much smaller than expected.
      AI Generated from the text of customer reviews Generated from the text of customer reviews

      690 customers mention ease of assembly, 583 positive, 107 negative690 customers mention "Ease of assembly"583 positive107 negative
      Customers find the storage cabinet easy to assemble, taking about 2 hours to complete.
      "...They promptly sent replacements. Easy to assemble. Added an up to date touch to my outdated BR! My clutter problem solved! Good quality for the price." Read more
      "It was easy to put together, but make sure you read the dimensions. I was looking for a shallow cabinet, depth wise, and that's what you are getting." Read more
      "Easy assembly. Does not come out too far from the wall. Shelves are height adjustable, and you can have 1,2,3 or no shelves, depending on your needs...." Read more
      "Very easy to assemble with only a screwdriver needed. I was missing steps 9 and 10 in the directions, which threw me for a bit, but I figured it out...." Read more
      554 customers mention quality, 466 positive, 88 negative554 customers mention "Quality"466 positive88 negative
      Customers find the storage cabinet to be of good quality, describing it as a nice piece of furniture.
      "Perfect size for bathroom. Easy to assemble with picture directions. Very sturdy and stable with plenty of room for toiletries, toilet paper, and..." Read more

      Amazon Customer
      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Images in this review

      Reviews with images

      See all photos
      Previous slide
      Next slide
      Amazon Customer
      5 out of 5 stars
      Beautiful, functional, and easy assembly.
      This is beautiful and just right in size (of course I measured my area before buying). It was very easy to put together and contained extras of various screws, etc. The one and only negative was that I could not secure all of the back panel screws due to the holes not lining up and/or being non-existent. I did what I could and it was more than adequate. It also includes hardware to anchor the unit to the wall should you desire to do so. Impressive overall. I am using it to put vegetables in each drawer, bread in the top cabinet shelf, and a boxed appliance in the bottom shelf.
      MoreHide

      • whitney simon
        1.0 out of 5 stars Would not purchase again
        Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026
        Style: 1 Door + 4 Drawers（32.3"）Color: Cloud WhiteVerified Purchase
        I had a very frustrating experience with this item from start to finish. First, the delivery was handled by a third-party carrier (UPS), not Amazon, which I was not made aware of beforehand. The package was originally scheduled for delivery on the expected date, but UPS claimed they were unable to deliver due to an “incorrect address,” even though my address was correct. They refused to re-deliver the same day. Three days later, the same issue happened again marked undeliverable due to address error, despite the address being accurate. I had to go back and forth with UPS multiple times to provide delivery instructions. What should have been a simple delivery ended up taking over a week due to UPS not following directions.

        Once the item finally arrived, the quality issues continued. During assembly, the very first step screwing the plastic drawer pieces into the sides was a problem because the provided screws were too small for the pre-drilled holes and would not hold. I did not want the hassle of returning the item, so I had to make an extra trip to Lowe’s to purchase screws that actually fit.

        Additionally, for the price, I expected much better quality. The wood is not very sturdy, and some of the screws began pushing through the wood during assembly.

        Overall, I would not recommend this item. Between the delivery issues and the poor build quality, it was far more trouble than it was worth. I also wish Amazon would clearly indicate when items are being delivered by third-party carriers instead of Amazon directly.
        Read more
        whitney simon
        1.0 out of 5 stars

      Product Summary: VASAGLE Floor Storage Cabinet, Freestanding Storage Unit with 2 Adjustable Shelves, for Bathroom Living Room Dining Kitchen, 11.8 x 23.6 x 31.5 Inches, Forest Green UBCB060C01

      From VASAGLE

      4.4 out of 5 stars, 8,183 ratings

      Customer reviews

      200+ bought in past month

      Price

      One-time purchase: $71.99 10% Savings

      List Price: $79.99

      Deal ends: 1773298799000

      Purchasing options

      Other sellers

      Other sellers

      About this Item

      • Spacious yet Space-Saving: Sized at 11.8"D x 23.6"W x 31.5"H, this storage unit occupies a small footprint while offering lots of storage. With this unit, you can make the most of your space
      • Sturdy, Stable, and Safe: Made of robust MDF, this freestanding storage cabinet is sturdy and stable; the anti-tip kit hidden on the back of this storage cabinet adds to the overall stability and safety
      • Adjustable Shelves: This multipurpose storage unit comes with 2 adjustable shelves (each has 3 heights) behind the doors, allowing you to organize both tall and short items and keep them away from dust
      • Beautiful Addition to Any Room: Elegant green color, combined with unique beadboard-style cabinet, make a stylish storage unit that fits in easily with your home decor, whether it’s your bathroom, living room, or entryway
      • Easy-Peasy Assembly: Never worry about assembly! Labeled parts and easy-to-follow instructions make this freestanding cabinet a breeze to assemble

      Product Description

      Specifications: - Color: Forest Green - Material: MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard) - Product Size: 11.8"D x 23.6"W x 31.5"H (30 x 60 x 80 cm) - Product Weight: 28.7 lb (13 kg) - Max. Static Load Capacity of the Tabletop: 110 lb (50 kg) - Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Adjustable Shelf: 33 lb (15 kg) Package Contents: - 1 x Floor Cabinet - 1 x Accessory Bag - 1 x Anti-Tip Kit - 1 x Instructions VASAGLE Notes: - For safety, be sure to secure the storage cabinet to the wall with the included anti-tip kit. - Do not expose the cabinet to water for extended periods of time to avoid cracking and deformation.
